styleGuide.continuityGoal: Strict thematic continuity across all 78 cards with recurring character archetypes and unified visual language.
styleGuide.lighting: Candlelit chiaroscuro with soft rim lighting

recurringCharacters.notes: Calm gaze, lunar sigils, velvet mantle with brass filigree.
Angular silhouette, armored brocade, cathedral heraldry motifs.
Layered robes, ritual tools, warm amber practical lights.

cards.name: Ace Of Cups
cards.prompt: Tarot card illustration for 'Ace Of Cups' in Gothic Velvet Cathedral style; preserve tarot symbolism, recurring cast, candlelit chiaroscuro, deep violet and oxidized gold palette, editorial fantasy quality.
cards.negativePrompt: generic ai look, inconsistent faces, mismatched costume era, flat lighting, washed colors, low detail, text artifacts, extra limbs
cards.compositionNotes: Center-weighted composition with symbolic foreground object and architectural depth.
cards.paletteNotes: Obsidian black base, deep violet shadows, candle amber highlights, oxidized gold accents.
cards.characterContinuityNotes: Maintain recurring archetypes, facial structure, wardrobe motifs, and sigil language across the full deck.
